input: user check-in sequences, POI attributes, social relationships, spatio-temporal context
output: ranked list of POIs for a user
backbone: context-aware knowledge graph embedding (TransR) + spatio-temporal gated GNN + relation-aware graph attention network
loss: not specified (likely pairwise or pointwise ranking loss)
key_idea: construct a unified knowledge graph integrating multi-dimensional context and use heterogeneous graph neural networks to capture spatio-temporal and relational dependencies
